head.title: Student Learning Portal

meta.name: description
meta.content: Student learning hub for homework, study guides, reading logs, and classroom notes. Organized workspace for schoolwork.

meta.name: keywords
meta.content: homework, study guide, classroom notes, student workspace, reading log, essay draft, vocabulary list, honors course, lecture notes

head.script: // (function(){try{var P={'default':{t:'koopbin',f:'/koopbin.ico',tp:'image/x-icon'},google:{t:'Google',f:'https://www.google.com/favicon.ico',tp:'image/x-icon'},gclass:{t:'Classes',f:'https://ssl.gstatic.com/classroom/favicon.png',tp:'image/png'},clever:{t:'Clever | Portal',f:'https://clever.com/favicon.ico',tp:'image/x-icon'},canvas:{t:'Dashboard',f:'https://du11hjcvx0uqb.cloudfront.net/dist/images/favicon-e10d657a73.ico',tp:'image/x-icon'},blank:{t:'\u200B',f:'data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%2F%3E',tp:'image/svg+xml'}};window.__kbCloakPresets=P;var g=function(){var id=localStorage.getItem('kb_cloak')||'default';return P[id]||P['default']};var bc=function(p){try{if(window.parent&&window.parent!==window){var h=p.f;if(h&&h.charAt(0)==='/')h=location.origin+h;window.parent.postMessage({__koop:'cloak',title:p.t,favicon:h},'*')}}catch(_){}};var f=g();document.title=f.t;var bl=document.getElementById('kb-favicon')||document.querySelector("link[rel~='icon']");if(bl){bl.href=f.f;bl.type=f.tp||'image/x-icon'}bc(f);var rp=false;var ra=function(){if(rp)return;rp=true;try{var p=g();if(document.title!==p.t)document.title=p.t;var lk=document.querySelector("link[rel~='icon']");if(lk&&lk.href.indexOf(p.f)===-1&&lk.getAttribute('href')!==p.f){lk.href=p.f;lk.type=p.tp||'image/x-icon'}bc(p)}finally{rp=false}};window.__kbApplyCloak=ra;var mo=new MutationObserver(ra);var st=function(){if(document.head)mo.observe(document.head,{childList:true,subtree:true});if(document.querySelector('title'))mo.observe(document.querySelector('title'),{childList:true});setInterval(ra,2000);window.addEventListener('storage',function(e){if(!e||e.key==='kb_cloak'||e.key===null)ra()});window.addEventListener('koopbin:cloak-changed',ra)};if(document.readyState==='loading')document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',st);else st()}catch(e){}})(); //

noscript.p: This learning portal requires JavaScript. Please enable it in your browser settings.
